# 报价单 / Quotation (Template)

Quotation No.: [QUOTE_NO]
Date: [YYYY-MM-DD]

To: [Buyer Company / Contact]
From: [Seller Company / Contact]

Item / Description:
1) Product: [Name / Model]
   - Unit Price: [USD xx.xx per unit]
   - MOQ: [xxx pcs]
   - Lead Time: [e.g., 30 days after deposit]
   - Packing: [e.g., 10 pcs per carton, carton size, gross/net weight]
   - Payment: [e.g., T/T 30% deposit, 70% before shipment]
   - Validity: [e.g., 30 days]

Total Price (USD): [USD xxxx.xx]
Incoterm: [e.g., FOB Shanghai]
Port of Loading: [Port]
Delivery Time: [Estimated]

Remarks / 备注:
[Additional notes, sample policy, warranty, etc.]

Best regards,
[Seller Company Name]
